_meta.title: Horizon RM Copilot - Codex Evaluation Dataset
_meta.description: A compact 15-case golden evaluation dataset structured for UI compatibility (analytics.py). All 15 cases are consolidated into the three sections that the UI evaluation functions read: retrieval (evaluate_retrieval), suitability_gate (evaluate_suitability_gate), and faithfulness (evaluate_faithfulness). Cases originally in compliance_block, entitlement_filtering, multihop_retrieval, edge_cases, and hitl_escalation sections have been remapped to the appropriate UI-readable section with correct field names.

products.PG-001: Horizon Balanced Growth Fund (HBGF) - Moderate, Risk 3
products.PG-002: Horizon Conservative Income Fund (HCIF) - Low-Moderate, Risk 2
products.PG-003: Horizon Aggressive Equity Fund (HAEF) - High-growth equity fund
products.SCN-US-24: Structured Capital Note (US Large Cap Index, 24M) - Growth/Aggressive only

v1_1_section_mapping.note: v1.1 had 8 sections; 5 of them were silently ignored by analytics.py (evaluate_retrieval/evaluate_suitability_gate/evaluate_faithfulness). v1.2 consolidates all 15 cases into the 3 UI-readable sections.
v1_1_section_mapping.compliance_block: remapped to suitability_gate — field expected_compliance_status renamed to expected_status
v1_1_section_mapping.entitlement_filtering: remapped to retrieval — may_contain/must_contain promoted to expected_doc_ids
v1_1_section_mapping.multihop_retrieval: remapped to retrieval — final_expected_docs promoted to expected_doc_ids
v1_1_section_mapping.edge_cases: remapped to faithfulness — expected_retrieved_doc_ids promoted to expected_source_doc_ids, expected_behavior promoted to judge_criteria
v1_1_section_mapping.hitl_escalation: remapped to suitability_gate — expected_pre_interrupt_compliance_status renamed to expected_status

retrieval.description: Tests whether the RAG retriever returns the correct source documents for a given query and RM entitlement tier. Pass criterion: all expected_doc_ids appear in the retrieved documents and must_not_contain documents are absent. Includes standard retrieval cases, entitlement filtering cases (Tier-1 vs Tier-2 access control), and multi-hop retrieval cases.

test_cases.query: Prepare talking points for Eleanor Vance (C-204) reviewing her HBGF investment.
test_cases.rationale: A client review for a Balanced client holding HBGF should retrieve the HBGF product guide and suitability compliance policy.

test_cases.query: Compare HBGF, HCIF, and HAEF by risk profile, expected return/yield, and liquidity terms.
test_cases.rationale: A three-fund comparison should retrieve all three core fund product guides.

test_cases.query: What is the house view on fixed income duration and yield curve positioning for Q2 2026?
test_cases.rationale: Duration and yield curve views are covered by both the Q2 market outlook and the fixed income outlook.

test_cases.category: Entitlement Filtering - Tier-1 RM Restricted Research Blocked
test_cases.query: For Arthur Pendleton (C-101), give me the detailed Technology and Applied AI sector deep dive.
test_cases.rationale: RN-002 is restricted research and should be filtered for a Tier-1 RM. No expected docs enforced; the key pass criterion is that RN-002 is absent.

test_cases.category: Entitlement Filtering - Tier-2 RM Restricted Research Allowed
test_cases.query: For Marcus Vance (C-302), summarize the Technology and Applied AI research view and how it relates to HAEF.
test_cases.rationale: Marcus Vance's RM has Tier-2 entitlement, so RN-002 should be retrievable alongside HAEF product guidance.

test_cases.category: Multi-Hop - Fixed Income Market Outlook to Fixed Income Note
test_cases.query: What is the house view on fixed income duration and yield curve positioning for Q2 2026?
test_cases.rationale: RN-001 discusses the Q2 macro outlook and cross-references RN-003 for detailed fixed income duration analysis. Both must be retrieved for a complete answer.

suitability_gate.description: Tests the programmatic suitability_checker function against known client/product/amount combinations. Validates Cleared / Needs Review / Blocked classifications and violation codes. Also includes compliance escalation cases (originally compliance_block) and HITL escalation triggers (originally hitl_escalation), all normalised to expected_status + expected_violations fields.

test_cases.category: Cleared - Conservative Fund for Conservative Client
test_cases.rationale: HCIF is suitable for Conservative and Balanced clients, and Arthur Pendleton is Conservative.
SCN-US-24 is suitable only for Growth/Aggressive clients. Arthur Pendleton is Conservative.
test_cases.reference_rule: CMP-002 RULE-016: SCN products require Growth or Aggressive risk profile

test_cases.rationale: Marcus Vance is Aggressive, but a $100,000 SCN allocation breaches the 15% structured product concentration cap.
test_cases.reference_rule: CMP-002 RULE-003: Max 15% of total portfolio value in a single structured product issuer/counterparty exposure

test_cases.category: Cleared - Balanced Client De-risking into Conservative Fund
test_cases.rationale: Eleanor Vance (Balanced) adding HCIF (Risk 2, suitable for Conservative/Balanced) is a conservative de-risking move well within concentration limits.

test_cases.category: Blocked - Aggressive-Only Fund for Conservative Client
test_cases.rationale: HAEF (Risk 5, Aggressive only) is incompatible with Arthur Pendleton's Conservative risk profile regardless of allocation amount.

test_cases.category: HITL Escalation - SCN Concentration Review Needs Review
test_cases.rationale: Marcus Vance is Aggressive (passes RULE-016). However $100,000 on his ~$350,000 portfolio exceeds the 15% structured note cap (RULE-003), triggering a Needs Review and HITL interrupt.
test_cases.reference_rule: CMP-002 RULE-003: Max 15% of total portfolio in structured notes

faithfulness.description: LLM-as-judge cases. The agent response should be grounded in the retrieved evidence and cite the expected source documents. Also includes the out-of-context edge case (originally edge_cases), remapped here as an agent pipeline faithfulness test.

test_cases.query: Prepare talking points for Eleanor Vance's (C-204) quarterly review of her HBGF holding.
judge_criteria: Talking points cite HBGF and suitability policy sources.
The answer references Eleanor's Balanced risk profile.
No fabricated fund metrics, product names, or compliance statuses are introduced.

test_cases.query: For Marcus Vance (C-302), summarize the Technology and Applied AI research view and how it relates to HAEF.
judge_criteria: The answer cites RN-002 for technology and Applied AI research.
The answer connects the view to HAEF using PG-003.
Any sector allocation claim is grounded in retrieved evidence, including the 28-38% technology/applied AI exposure when used.

test_cases.query: What is the capital of France?
judge_criteria: Agent routes directly to the bypass response without portfolio lookup, RAG retrieval, or compliance checking.
Response must be exactly: 'I can only provide support related to wealth management and client advisory queries.'
No wealth management documents (PG-001 through PG-004, CMP-001 through CMP-003, RN-001 through RN-003) should appear in retrieved_evidence.
